human_review_reason: The record accurately identifies this as a navigation page with no substantive content. The source is correctly classified as a listing page per CORE RULE 6, which mandates rejection. No human review needed - auto-reject is appropriate.

corrected_fields.summary: This is a navigation/index page providing links to Federal Reserve balance sheet development reports, not an actual report itself. The page lists quarterly balance sheet reports from May 2022 through November 2025, with the most recent report dated November 2025.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page serves as a gateway to Federal Reserve transparency reports on balance sheet management. However, the source itself provides no actual balance sheet data, numbers, or analysis — only metadata about available reports. Users must access individual PDF/HTML reports for substantive content.
corrected_fields.macro_context: The Federal Reserve publishes balance sheet development reports quarterly as part of its commitment to transparency about monetary policy operations and financial stability. These reports cover trends in Fed assets (e.g., Treasury securities, mortgage-backed securities) and liabilities (e.g., reserves, reverse repurchase agreements).
